configurations.name: weltari-real
runtimeArgs: export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@24/bin:$PATH"; export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=$(grep '^OPENROUTER_API_KEY=' .env | cut -d= -f2-); export WELTARI_IMAGE_BACKEND=stub; export WELTARI_MODEL=deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro; export WELTARI_DB_PATH="${TMPDIR:-/tmp/}weltari-real/w.sqlite"; export WELTARI_IMAGES_DIR="${TMPDIR:-/tmp/}weltari-real/images"; mkdir -p "${TMPDIR:-/tmp/}weltari-real"; node apps/server/dist/main.js

configurations.name: weltari-fake
runtimeArgs: export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@24/bin:$PATH"; export WELTARI_FAKE_LLM=1; export WELTARI_DB_PATH="${TMPDIR:-/tmp/}weltari-fake/w.sqlite"; export WELTARI_IMAGES_DIR="${TMPDIR:-/tmp/}weltari-fake/images"; mkdir -p "${TMPDIR:-/tmp/}weltari-fake"; node apps/server/dist/main.js

configurations.name: weltari-masking
runtimeArgs: export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/node@24/bin:$PATH"; export WELTARI_FAKE_LLM=1; export WELTARI_FAKE_LLM_DELAY_MS=7000; export WELTARI_DB_PATH="${TMPDIR:-/tmp/}weltari-mask/w.sqlite"; export WELTARI_IMAGES_DIR="${TMPDIR:-/tmp/}weltari-mask/images"; mkdir -p "${TMPDIR:-/tmp/}weltari-mask"; node apps/server/dist/main.js
